/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,librelbot_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so -o librelbot_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so CMakeFiles/relbot_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp/relbot_msgs/msg/detail/relbot_motors__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/relbot_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp/relbot_msgs/msg/detail/relbot_motors_stamped__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ubuntu/Robotics/ros2_ws/build/relbot_msgs:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: librelbot_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
